title: caladenia montana
intro: Caladenia montana, commonly known as the mountain spider orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to Australia and is known for its unique, delicate appearance and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Caladenia montana are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea that can be used to alleviate symptoms of the aforementioned conditions.
